sys_ui_page.description:
UI Page to prompt from Platform about cancellation of Tasks and subtasks; renamed cancel_prompt to cancel_task_prompt
v2.7 2.7.0 | 2021-09-22 | mmcc | STRY0108861 - DIA- Cancel from Top Task Notification renamed cancel_prompt to cancel_task_prompt; total rewrite
2.5.3 - 325 - corrected spelling error on the cancellation reason field when writing to Task field from page
sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } Warning Tasker - Warning: You have {0} open subtasks Tasker - By cancelling this task, you will automatically cancel the subtasks as well Tasker - Are you sure you would like to continue? Tasker - Cancellation Reason Tasker - Type your reason here cancel Tasker - Button - Cancel Task(s) Tasker - Sets the State to Cancelled
var messageOpenTasksCount = ''; var descendantsCount = 0; var taskSys_Id = jelly.jvar_taskSysId; var filter_ancestors = 'u_all_ancestors_tasksLIKE' + taskSys_Id; var gaSubTasks = new GlideAggregate("x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance"); gaSubTasks.addEncodedQuery(filter_ancestors); gaSubTasks.addQuery('state', 'NOT IN', '3, 4, 7'); // 3 = Completed; 4 = Closed Incomplete; 7 = Cancelled gaSubTasks.addAggregate('COUNT'); gaSubTasks.query(); if (gaSubTasks.next()) { // Need to subtract 1 since this task is also in the list of ancestors descendantsCount = gaSubTasks.getAggregate('COUNT') - 1; } descendantsCount = descendantsCount.toFixed(0); messDescendantsCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - Warning: You have {0} open subtasks', [descendantsCount]);

${gs.getMessage('Warning')}!

${jvar_messageOpenTasksCount}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - By cancelling this task, you will automatically cancel the subtasks as well')}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Are you sure you would like to continue?')}




${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Cancel Task(s)')}
sys_ui_page.name: cancel_task_prompt
